## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — tooling / deps / config
- [ ] docs — documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm install` runs cleanly
- [ ] Frontend builds (`cd apps/web && pnpm build`)
- [ ] Backend builds (`cd apps/api && pnpm build`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Tested manually locally
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or credentials included
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] `ERKLAERUNG.md` updated if this changes what a part of the app does
